name: Canneloni Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground chuck, onion, celery, carrot, and garlic in a skillet; cook over medium heat until the meat is browned and crumbled.
2. Drain the mixture in a colander and pat dry with paper towels. Wipe pan drippings from the skillet and return the beef mixture to the skillet.
3. Thaw and drain spinach; press between paper towels to remove excess liquid. Add spinach, wine, Parmesan, egg, basil, oregano, and salt; stir well.
4. Spoon 3 tablespoons of meat mixture down the center of each crepe. Fold sides over and place seam side up in a 13"x9"x2 inches baking dish coated with Pam cooking spray. Set aside.
5. In a small saucepan, combine milk and flour, stirring until smooth. Add water, bouillon granules, and seasonings. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and comes to a boil.
6. Pour the sauce over crepes. Cover and bake at 375 degrees for 20 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with mozzarella and bake uncovered an additional 5 minutes.
8. Serve garnished with parsley sprigs.
